neighborhood.description: Established suburban residential neighborhood consisting primarily of one- and two-story single-family homes built from the late 1990s through the 2010s.
neighborhood.boundaries: Veterans Parkway on the west, Hershey Road on the east, Empire Street on the north, and Oakland Avenue on the south.
neighborhood.landUse: Predominantly single-family residential with supporting neighborhood commercial uses along major arterials.
